status_detail: SAME wire failure as #633/#634/#635. ChatGPT-aligned h2 params hypothesis FALSIFIED. Switching from h2_mode=2/h2_goaway=0 to h2_mode=1 (cascade shutdown) + h2_goaway=1 (send GOAWAY) did NOT change client-visible behavior. POST /api/streamingSearch: still '(failed)' badge in DevTools, still 0 response headers, still 0 body, still generic error UI 'Sorry, something went wrong. Error ID 1ba02d7b-a08f-4aca-8bac-a5f079274dc7|949f2035-a252-4098-abd0-d23e5610a57d|2026-04-28T08:25:54.178Z'. Disconnect REMAINS between engine egress (547B envelope confirmed in #635) and you.com edge/proxy ingress (0 bytes received).
request_status: (failed) -- DevTools red badge, no HTTP status code
generic_error_text: Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later. Error ID 1ba02d7b-a08f-4aca-8bac-a5f079274dc7|949f2035-a252-4098-abd0-d23e5610a57d|2026-04-28T08:25:54.178Z
h2_params_changed: h2_mode 2->1 (cascade shutdown), h2_goaway 0->1 (send GOAWAY) -- matched chatgpt working pattern
h2_params_hypothesis_outcome: FALSIFIED -- changing h2 params did not change client-visible behavior
progress_vs_635: SAME -- switching to ChatGPT-aligned h2 params did NOT change client-visible behavior. Still 0 response headers, still (failed), still generic error UI.
breakthrough_status: NO BREAKTHROUGH. h2_mode/h2_goaway tuning is NOT the differentiator between you.com and genspark/chatgpt.
root_cause_hypothesis: Disconnect remains between engine egress (547B envelope confirmed in #635) and you.com edge/proxy ingress. Suspect: (a) CDN/edge buffering specific to you.com's infrastructure stripping the substituted response, (b) TCP FIN/GOAWAY race condition where engine's frame ordering is rejected by you.com's edge proxy, (c) you.com's infrastructure expects upstream to be a specific server (e.g. validates Server header or TLS fingerprint).
recommendation_for_dev: URGENT: tcpdump on engine egress (NOT bridge ingress) to see the actual bytes leaving the engine for you.com. Compare to chatgpt egress for same prompt. The engine may be writing valid HTTP/2 but you.com's edge rejecting it.
Try yet another tuning: h2_mode=0 (default/no special close), h2_goaway=2 (different value if available). Brute-force the 4 combinations.
Test from a different network egress IP if engine has multiple. you.com may be IP-banning the engine egress IP after seeing many TCP RSTs.
Check you.com's TLS handshake completion: if engine TLS termination negotiated different ALPN/cipher than what chatgpt sees, edge may reject.

Side approach: instead of intercepting /api/streamingSearch, intercept the EARLIER request (you.com first sends OPTIONS preflight or similar). Modify what triggers the chat path, not the chat path itself.

After 4 failed iterations on you.com (#633, #634, #635, #636), recommend pivoting to a different service first (e.g. complete the gemini3 B-series breakthrough) and returning to you.com with engine-side TCP capture as priority.
errors_observed: POST /api/streamingSearch: (failed), 0 headers, 0 body, 'Failed to load response data'
notes: Cycle 95 you SSE v3 with chatgpt-aligned h2 params. FAIL = h2 hypothesis falsified. 4th iteration on you.com without progress. Strong evidence engine emits 547B but you.com edge/proxy strips. Subagent 4m, well within 5min soft (no overage).
